summary: Iteration-3 focused verification of the three narrow post-code-review fixes (analytics variable renames, unused `alert=` removal in scam_check, LiveAlertFeed empty-catch → console.warn('[LiveAlertFeed] ...')). All 6 backend pytest checks pass and full frontend flow verified: login → /admin → ws-status 'Streams · Live' → /api/alerts/simulate toast → /admin/analytics renders all 6 Recharts SVGs. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py analytics(): variable-shadowing fix is clean — loop-scoped names (scam, verdict, v_note, cf, day, st) are unambiguous. Response shape and counts unchanged (verified via /api/analytics: scam_by_day len=7, all 6 keys present with correct nested structure).
server.py scam_check(): unused `alert = ...` was removed; endpoint still emits alert + creates high-severity case (verified: alerts count grew, case count grew after high verdict POST).

LiveAlertFeed.jsx: all 4 catch blocks now log with '[LiveAlertFeed]' prefix (onmessage parse, onerror, close-on-error, unmount close). Confirmed in browser console — 2 [LiveAlertFeed] warnings observed, 0 silent/empty errors, 0 console errors overall.
Note (unchanged): raw JWT still stored in localStorage in auth.jsx per the added security comment — acceptable for demo but XSS surface remains. Not a regression.
seed_data_creation: None new. Reused seeded admin + existing seeded cases/alerts/counterfeit/hotspots.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-3 covered only the three narrow fixes: (a) /api/analytics shape/keys/lengths after variable renames — 6/6 keys present, scam_by_day is exactly 7 entries, verdict/note_verdict/case_status buckets intact; (b) /api/scam/check still creates a case AND emits an alert for High/Confirmed Scam (verified count grew — remember /api/alerts default limit is 30, use limit=500 when checking growth); (c) LiveAlertFeed logs use '[LiveAlertFeed]' prefix. WebSocket flow through the preview ingress (wss) still works — hello + alert broadcast within 25s. Auth (admin login), GET /api/cases, PATCH /api/cases/{id} audit trail all clean. Full iteration-2 tests were not re-run per main-agent instructions (focused verification only).
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. One test bug detected during iteration and fixed: /api/alerts defaults limit=30, so measuring alert-count growth requires an explicit larger `limit` query param.
